title: Scientific Communication
description: Explaining complex findings to non-experts without distortion.
summary_pt_br: Comunicação científica: analogia, quantificar incerteza, evitar jargão ou defini-lo, voz ativa pra conclusões.

scenes.subtitle_en: Explaining complex findings to non-experts without distortion.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Comunicação científica: analogia, quantificar incerteza, evitar jargão ou defini-lo, voz ativa pra conclusões.

scenes.text_en: Explaining complex findings to non-experts without distortion. Focus: scientific communication. Think of the immune system as a very fast library.
scenes.text_pt: Comunicação científica: analogia, quantificar incerteza, evitar jargão ou defini-lo, voz ativa pra conclusões. Foco: scientific communication. Pense no sistema imunológico como uma biblioteca veloz.

scenes.title: Scientific Communication
scenes.body_en: Key moves: use analogy, quantify uncertainty, avoid jargon OR define it, use active voice for conclusions, passive for methods.
scenes.body_pt: Comunicação científica: analogia, quantificar incerteza, evitar jargão ou defini-lo, voz ativa pra conclusões.

examples.en: Think of the immune system as a very fast library.
examples.pt: Pense no sistema imunológico como uma biblioteca veloz.

examples.en: The finding has a 95% confidence interval.
examples.pt: O achado tem intervalo de confiança de 95%.

examples.en: We observed correlation, not causation, in this sample.
examples.pt: Observamos correlação, não causa, nesta amostra.

exercise.question: Complete: "Think of the immune system as a very fast ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Think of the immune system as a very fast library."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Pense no sistema imunológico como uma biblioteca veloz.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
The finding has a 95% confidence interval.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "The finding has a 95% confidence interval."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O achado tem intervalo de confiança de 95%.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Scientific Communication — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre scientific communication. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Explain a virus to a curious 12-year-old.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It's a code that tricks cells into copying it.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We have 95% confidence within this range.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The pattern is unlikely to be random.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Things move together — one doesn't cause the other.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Close with what you don't yet know.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We don't know yet if this extends to other populations.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good science communication is humility, not hype.

scenes.title: The science fair
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Explain a research finding clearly for non-experts. Use at least two communication techniques.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the school science fair, Maya explained her research to curious parents who had no formal background in biology.

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: Think of the immune system as a very fast library that learns every threat by reading and remembering it.

paragraphs.speaker: Parent
paragraphs.en: And the statistical finding of yours — what does ninety-five percent confidence actually mean in practice?

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: It means the pattern we observed is very unlikely to be random, though we still can't claim causation.

paragraphs.speaker: Parent
paragraphs.en: I finally understand why scientists say 'we don't yet know' even when the public wants certainty immediately.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Communicating science, Maya had learned, was the slow art of being honest without sounding evasive to the audience.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Scientific Communication". Explaining complex findings to non-experts without distortion. Think of the immune system as a very fast library. The finding has a 95% confidence interval. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Scientific Communication". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
